data.title: Digital health market to reach USD 449.19 billion by 2032 due to growing chronic diseases, driving demand for remote monitoring and telehealth.
data.description: The global digital health market is expected to grow significantly, driven by the increasing prevalence of chronic diseases worldwide. Digital technologies such as remote monitoring and telehealth are playing a crucial role in providing continuous care to patients, enhancing disease management, and reducing hospital visits. This trend is particularly important as chronic diseases continue to pose a significant healthcare challenge. With the market projected to reach $379 billion by 2025, the adoption of these digital health tools is set to transform the way healthcare is delivered and managed.

data.title: Japan may introduce flat 20% tax on crypto gains, consider Bitcoin ETFs, as per report by Nikkei. Regulatory proposal expected by August.
data.description: Japan's market regulator is set to propose changes to the tax code, potentially allowing for domestic cryptocurrency ETFs. The Financial Services Agency plans to seek a review of the cryptocurrency tax treatment for the fiscal year 2026, with the proposal due by the end of August. This may involve moving cryptocurrency gains to a new tax category with a fixed 20% tax rate, like standard capital gains taxes. This marks a significant departure from the existing system of taxing cryptocurrencies. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fivetran and S3NS partner to provide secure data movement for European industries amid increasing regulations.
data.description: Fivetran, a key player in data movement worldwide, has recently revealed a significant partnership with S3NS, a subsidiary of Thales that operates using Google Cloud technology and is completely owned by Thales. This collaboration is particularly crucial as businesses throughout Europe are encountering growing demands to update their operations with cloud technology while ensuring that confidential data remains within the region, secure, and in adherence to strict regulations. Sectors like banking, insurance, government, and energy are especially affected by this trend.

data.title: Valmet to deliver IntelliTissue 1600 machine to PT Suparma Tbk in Indonesia, Aug 25, 2025, for high-quality tissue production.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Valmet Oyj announced that they will be providing PT Suparma Tbk's mill in Surabaya, Indonesia with an IntelliTissue 1600 tissue machine. This new installation aims to enhance production capabilities, allowing for the manufacturing of top-notch tissue products.

data.title: HiTHIUM celebrates 100GWh shipment milestone in Chongqing. Accelerating growth in energy storage since 2021.
data.description: In Chongqing, China, on August 22, 2025, HiTHIUM, a prominent global energy storage technology firm, marked a significant achievement by hosting the "HiTHIUM 100GWh Shipment Milestone Ceremony" at its manufacturing base. Commencing shipments in late 2021, the company has reached a milestone of 100 gigawatt-hours in shipments.

FITCH AFFIRMS INDIA AT 'BBB-'; OUTLOOK STABLE

data.title: FileOnQ partners with City of Portland to distribute & support SAMS software for public safety. Empowering agencies in justice for sexual assault survivors.
data.description: In Seattle on August 25, 2025, FileOnQ, a prominent provider of public safety software, unveiled the latest addition to its lineup of solutions - SAMSOnQ. This software, originally created by the City of Portland, will now be offered and maintained by FileOnQ. This move allows for a wider distribution and support network for SAMS, bringing advanced public safety technology to more users.

data.title: First AI Web3 Media, Blockchain.News, tokenizes assets on MINAX, pioneering media assetization with AI + blockchain. (Read More)
data.description: The first AI-driven Web3 media brand, Blockchain.News, has recently been listed on MINAX. This move marks a significant step in assetizing media through the combination of AI and blockchain technology. By leveraging these innovative tools, Blockchain.News is paving the way for the tokenization of assets in the media industry. This development highlights the growing importance of merging artificial intelligence and blockchain in the digital world.

data.title: Hacker linked to Coinbase buys $8M of Solana; trading activity tracked by Lookonchain amid ongoing cybercrime investigation.
data.description: Lookonchain has reported that a hacker linked to Radiant Capital and an unidentified cybercriminal have been involved in trading activities. The hacker, along with another individual, are suspected of making transactions within the market.
Alm. Brand A/S provided a weekly update on their share buybacks.

data.title: JD Vance says Russia has softened stance on Ukraine conflict, offering concessions. Sanctions still on the table.
data.description: During an interview on NBC News' "Meet the Press," Vice President J.D. Vance revealed that Russia has shown a willingness to compromise in the Ukraine conflict. This shift marks the first time in the three and a half years of the conflict that Russia has displayed flexibility on its key demands. Vance highlighted that Russia has backed away from the idea of establishing a puppet regime in Kyiv and has accepted the necessity of providing security guarantees for Ukraine's territorial integrity. Despite this progress, Vance mentioned that the possibility of imposing sanctions on Russia remains open but will be assessed on a case-by-case basis. Regarding Russian airstrikes on a U.S.-owned electronics factory, Vance condemned the actions while underscoring the imperative to end the conflict.
Gold Prices Remain Stable as Markets Anticipate September Federal Reserve Rate Cut

data.title: Lundbeck to share long-term impact data on bexicaserin for rare epilepsy treatment at upcoming congress.
data.description: The outcomes of the open label extension (OLE) from the Phase 1b/2a PACIFIC trial studying bexicaserin's effectiveness in treating patients with Developmental and Epileptic Encephalopathies (DEEs) will be unveiled for the first time at the upcoming International Epilepsy Annual Congress. This trial is crucial in examining the potential benefits of bexicaserin for individuals with DEEs, with significant findings to be shared at the conference.

data.title: First AI-Powered Web3 Media Brand, Blockchain.News, lists on MINAX, tokenizing brand equity. Redefines content value with AI & blockchain in media assetization.
data.description: The MINAX platform has announced the listing of Blockchain.News, making it the pioneering AI-powered Web3 media entity to tokenize its brand equity as on-chain assets. This significant development signals a revolutionary phase for media assetization, merging AI technology with blockchain to transform the perception of content worth, and creating worldwide possibilities for the digital content sector.
